name: Banana Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend the sugar and Sugar Twin with the margarine until smooth.
2. Add the eggs to the mixture and mix well.
3. Sift together the flour and baking soda into a separate bowl.
4. Stir the sifted ingredients into the wet mixture.
5. Mix the milk and vinegar in another bowl, then add it to the main mixture.
6. Gently fold in the mashed bananas.
7. Pour the batter into a greased 9 x 5 inch loaf pan.
8. Bake for 1 hour at 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
9. Allow the bread to cool before cutting into slices (approximately 20 slices).
